title: citrus × aurantium subf. truncata
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. truncata, also known as bitter orange or seville orange, is a plant that is a hybrid of the sweet orange (Citrus sinensis) and the pomelo (Citrus maxima). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. truncata include reducing stress, improving mood, and supporting weight loss, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and limonoids. Herbal preparations of Citrus × aurantium subf. truncata include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
intro_study: According to "International journal of environmental health research", citrus × aurantium subf. truncata extracts have been found to possess potent virucidal effects against herpes simplex virus type-1.
